content:
After years of mixing strange potions and reading dusty books, I finally found the secret to living forever! I felt like a superhero. But just as I was imagining all the cool things I could do, a shadow appeared. It was Death, but not scary—more like a tall, polite person in a black cloak.

He smiled and handed me a shiny business card. “When you realize living forever isn’t as fun as it sounds,” he said, “call this number. I’ve got a job for you.”

I looked at the card. It said: *Death’s Help Desk – For Eternal Life Problems.*

I laughed. Maybe living forever sounds great, but even superheroes need a break. I wondered what kind of job Death had in mind. Maybe I’d call him someday—after all, even forever can get boring!
